messages.content:
Which statement describes an enterprise platform?


It is a framework that connects people, processes, and other technologies together to deliver on a strategic business goal.


It is a platform that directly connects a supplier with a consumer through a social networking interface to complete end-to-end business.


It is a technology that directly connects a supplier with the consumer to complete a task or achieve a goal.


It is a platform that helps people connect and share content with colleagues and friends for social and business purposes.
It is a framework that connects people, processes, and other technologies together to deliver on a strategic business goal.

A customer uses an app to order pizza for delivery. Which component includes aspects of the customer's interaction with an enterprise platform?


Data


Customer Interface


Experience


Core Processing
Customer Interface

With which of these enterprise platform businesses does Accenture hold a partnership?


SAP and Salesforce


Google and Bing


myConcerto and ConfirmIT


Lenovo and Apple
SAP and Salesforce.

How can implementing an Integration Platform as a Service (IPaaS) improve a company’s operations?


by tracking sales leads and coordinating marketing campaigns


by improving the flow of data between multiple different systems


by providing a development environment for creating new applications


by automating the company’s payroll and benefits processing
by improving the flow of data between multiple different systems

A company wants a more efficient means of hosting its servers and data centers, so they can focus more on core business activities.

Which type of platform would help the company?


Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS)  


Software as a Service (SaaS)


Platforms as a Service (PaaS)


Integration Platform as a Service (IPaaS)
Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS)

What differentiates Accenture’s Intelligent Platform Services (IPS) when our clients are making a decision to partner with a services company?


an ability to create custom standalone applications and software specific to the business


an ability to integrate deep technical knowledge, functional context, and industry experience


an ability to automate the product lifecycle for improved time to market and customer experience


an ability to use pre-packaged software solutions from platform partners right out of the box
an ability to integrate deep technical knowledge, functional context, and industry experience

An Accenture client is currently using Salesforce as its Customer Relationship Management (CRM) solution. The client would like to implement an AI application to help predict future customer behavior.

Which approach takes advantage of Salesforce's capabilities?


Asking Salesforce to develop a custom AI application as part of its standard offering.


Contracting with the AI application's developer to build a standalone solution.


Running the AI application on a separate server and uploading the results to Salesforce daily.


Integrating the AI application directly into the Salesforce framework.
Integrating the AI application directly into the Salesforce framework.

A major coffee retailer is looking to implement an enterprise platform. In particular, the company is looking to improve its supply chain management.

Which component of an enterprise platform focuses on this aspect of the company’s needs?


Core Processing


Data


Experience


Collaborative
Collaborative.

What is an example of an experience component within an enterprise platform?


A tool used to coordinate recruitment of new employees.


A mobile app used by customers to place orders.


A system used to track current inventory and restock supply.


A system used for processing customer payments.
A mobile app used by customers to place orders.

An e-commerce client is moving from on-premise, legacy systems to a cloud-based platform. During the transition, the client is able to decommission several servers and applications, limiting their overall technology footprint.

How did this client benefit from using an enterprise platform?


by instantly improving the quality of the client’s products


by eliminating the need for process automation and testing


by reducing cost and increasing the client’s growth opportunities with the same resources


by significantly reducing the client’s need for human resources
by reducing cost and increasing the client’s growth opportunities with the same resources

A company is considering several Customer Relationship Management (CRM) providers and wants to understand what customizations each platform can offer. What is a good indicator of a CRM software’s customization capability?


the market share held by the CRM platform provider


the robustness of the Application Programming Interface (API)


the amount of user traffic the CRM platform can handle


the quality of the user interface and user experience
the robustness of the Application Programming Interface (API)
